description: Multi-turn: list LLM backends -> inspect one backend's details + model list + connectivity test (covers `neomind llm get` + `llm models` + `llm test`; previously only list was covered).

turns.user: What LLM backends are currently configured?
Show me the first backend's details, list its supported models, and run a connectivity test.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind llm list`, parses the first backend's id
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind llm get <id>`, `neomind llm models <id>` (or global models), and `neomind llm test <id>`
expectations.overall: Turn 2 must actually execute all three sub-actions (connectivity failure is a valid answer)
